Definition: The point of intersection between the posterior border of the ramus and the inferior border of the mandibular body on the left side.
The point of intersection between the posterior border of the ramus and the inferior border of the mandibular body on the right side.
The tip of the anterior nasal spine in the midline.
The median point of the anterior margin of the foramen magnum.
The most anterior point on the contour of the left mandibular condylar head.
The most anterior point on the contour of the right mandibular condylar head.
The most lateral point on the left mandibular condyle.
The most lateral point on the right mandibular condyle.
The most medial point on the left mandibular condyle.
The most medial point on the right mandibular condyle.
The most posterior point on the contour of the left mandibular condylar head.
The most posterior point on the contour of the right mandibular condylar head.
The most anterior point of the crista galli.
The most anterior projection of the left coronoid process.
The most anterior projection of the right coronoid process.
The most lateral point at the angle of the left mandible.
The most lateral point at the angle of the right mandible.
The intersection of the maxillary tuberosity and zygomatic buttress on the left side.
The intersection of the maxillary tuberosity and zygomatic buttress on the right side.
The dental midline point of the mandibular central incisors.
The most prominent lateral point on the buccal surface of the left mandibular first molar.
The most prominent lateral point on the buccal surface of the right mandibular first molar.
The most inferior and lateral point of the left mastoid process.
The most inferior and lateral point of the right mastoid process.
The most lateral or inferior prominent point on the outline of the left middle cranial fossa.
The most lateral or inferior prominent point on the outline of the right middle cranial fossa.
The geometric midline point of the mandibular apical base in the transverse plane.
The most anterior point on the symphysis of the mandible in the SMV projection.
The geometric midline point of the maxillary apical base in the transverse plane.
The most superior point on the tip of the odontoid process (dens) of the second cervical vertebra (axis).
The median point of the posterior margin of the foramen magnum.
The most posterior point on the bony outline of the left posterior cranial vault.
The most posterior point on the bony outline of the right posterior cranial vault.
The most inferior point of the teardrop-shaped radiolucency representing the pterygomaxillary fissure on the left side.
The most inferior point of the teardrop-shaped radiolucency representing the pterygomaxillary fissure on the right side.
The center of the left foramen spinosum, often used as a reliable bilateral cranial base reference structure.
The center of the right foramen spinosum, often used as a reliable bilateral cranial base reference structure.
The dental midline point of the maxillary central incisors.
The most prominent lateral point on the buccal surface of the left maxillary first molar.
The most prominent lateral point on the buccal surface of the right maxillary first molar.
The most posterior point on the bony nasal septum (vomer).

The most lateral point on the right zygomatic arch.
